description: Compositions:Large canvas tote with embroidery and zipped pocket on the insideThis hibiscus red canvas tote from murcia is that ideal accessory to make you look chik in western casuals and Indian ethnic. The intricate golden floral embroidery, tan piping and straps give it that feminine edge. It has a roomy interior with a zipped inner pocket that can hold your purse and keys, while there's  another pocket to cushion guard your mobile phone.bag careRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirtUse a mild leather cleaner
